CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_GISProximityCheck when a BLM tribal or trust land boundary intersects the project buffer (1.0 mile). Triggers EO 13175 government-to-government consultation and NHPA Section 106 review. NEPA_CE_Screener routes to set nepa_extraordinary_circumstances__c when this flag is active.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: BLM tribal or trust land boundary within 1.0 mile of project. Government-to-government consultation required under EO 13175. NHPA Section 106 review required.
CustomField.label: Tribal Lands Proximity Flag
